title: Israeli soldiers open fire at car in West Bank; 7-month-old infant dies
summary_full: In a heartbreaking incident in Hebron, a Palestinian infant lost his life after Israeli soldiers opened fire on his family's vehicle. The father recounted how they had paused and raised their hands in surrender moments before the shots erupted. According to the IDF, the troops perceived the car as a potential threat due to its speed.
